{{CargoRelic
|name=Aspirin
|class_id=20344
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=Aspirin, aka acetylsalicylic acid, is one of the three classic drugs in medical history. It has been in use for more than a hundred years, and is still the most widely used antipyretic, analgesic, anti-inflammatory med in the world!
|fame=13
|art=17
|fth=14
|civ=17
|tech=29
|ss1=Per 5 Minions Healed, Snail DEF +1<br>Minions healed: 100/100
|ss2=Per 5 Minions Healed, Snail DEF +2<br>Minions healed: 100/100
|ss3=Per 5 Minions Healed, Snail DEF +3<br>Minions healed: 100/100
|ss4=Per 5 Minions Healed, Snail DEF +3<br>Minions healed: 100/100
|ss7=Per 5 Minions Healed, Snail DEF +3<br>Minions healed: 100/100<br> (Awakened)
}}
